- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task (not needed for this starter app)
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

- Sarajevo Eat Picker is a mobile-first Expo app for choosing coffee or food in Sarajevo.
- The app uses local sample venue data with device location support and Maps links.
- Keep edits focused on the mobile recommendation flow and update the README when behavior changes.
